radio.not_supported: Your browser does not support audio playback.

lotto.title: Lotto Number Generator
lotto.description: Get lucky numbers based on an algorithm used by thousands. Randomly pick 6 unique numbers from 1 to 45 to increase your odds. Click below to generate now!
lotto.a1: Our algorithm uses pure random number generation, ensuring each number has an equal chance. While it doesn't guarantee a win, it's optimized for fun and convenience.
lotto.a2: For your privacy, numbers are not saved and will disappear on refresh. Please note down any numbers you like.

weather.title: Seoul Songpa-gu Weather
weather.footer: Forecast based on real-time observation data.

animal_test.title: Animal Face Test (Dog vs Cat)
animal_test.description: Analyze your face using Google's AI Teachable Machine. Are you a cute dog type or a chic cat type? Upload a photo to find out instantly!
animal_test.guide_description: Based on an AI model trained on thousands of dog and cat photos. It analyzes your facial features and contours to show the most similar type as a percentage.
animal_test.a_safe: Yes, it's safe. All analysis happens in your browser. No images are sent to or stored on our server.

about.title: About Multi-Tool
about.description: Multi-Tool provides various fun and useful tools for everyday life. We use the latest web tech and AI to build features that are easy for everyone to enjoy. We value user feedback to keep improving.

inquiry.title: Contact Us
inquiry.description: For suggestions or business inquiries, please reach out via the form below. We value your feedback.
